title: Acquire New Skills
description: Go beyond the basics. Learn techniques that make you more effective — from vibe coding entire apps with AI to debugging like a pro and landing your first dev job.
outcomes: Build complete apps by describing them in plain English (vibe coding)
Debug errors systematically instead of guessing
Build a portfolio and skills that get you hired
Use AI tools effectively as a coding partner, not a crutch

recommendedPaths.title: Vibe Coding
recommendedPaths.reason: Build software by describing what you want. The fastest way to go from idea to working app — no syntax required.

recommendedPaths.title: Debugging with AI
recommendedPaths.reason: Things will break. Learn how to find and fix bugs systematically using AI as your debugging partner.

recommendedPaths.title: Get Your First Dev Job
recommendedPaths.reason: Turn your coding skills into a career. Portfolio building, interview prep, and what hiring managers actually look for.

concepts.name: Prompt Engineering for Code
concepts.explanation: The quality of AI-generated code depends on how you describe what you want. Being specific about behavior, edge cases, and tech stack produces dramatically better results.

concepts.name: Debugging Mindset
concepts.explanation: Debugging isn't guessing — it's systematically narrowing down where things went wrong. Read the error, form a hypothesis, test it. AI accelerates every step.

concepts.name: Iterative Development
concepts.explanation: Build in layers — get the core working first, then add features one at a time. Trying to build everything at once produces worse results with both AI and manual coding.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.description: The most popular AI code editor — built for vibe coding workflows

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Agentic coding in your terminal — great for building full projects from a description

tools.name: Lovable
tools.description: AI full-stack engineer — generates complete apps from a single prompt
